CustomField.formula:
IF( HouseholdSize__c =1,$CustomMetadata.PovertyIncomeLevels__mdt.X2024_Poverty_income_levels.X1_Hhd_Member__c, IF( HouseholdSize__c =2,$CustomMetadata.PovertyIncomeLevels__mdt.X2024_Poverty_income_levels.X2_Hhd_Member__c, IF( HouseholdSize__c =3,$CustomMetadata.PovertyIncomeLevels__mdt.X2024_Poverty_income_levels.X3_Hhd_Member__c, IF( HouseholdSize__c =4,$CustomMetadata.PovertyIncomeLevels__mdt.X2024_Poverty_income_levels.X4_Hhd_Member__c, IF( HouseholdSize__c =5,$CustomMetadata.PovertyIncomeLevels__mdt.X2024_Poverty_income_levels.X5_Hhd_Member__c, IF( HouseholdSize__c =6,$CustomMetadata.PovertyIncomeLevels__mdt.X2024_Poverty_income_levels.X6_hhd_Member__c, IF( HouseholdSize__c =7,$CustomMetadata.PovertyIncomeLevels__mdt.X2024_Poverty_income_levels.X7_Hhd_Member__c, IF( HouseholdSize__c =8,$CustomMetadata.PovertyIncomeLevels__mdt.X2024_Poverty_income_levels.X8_Hhd_Member__c, 0
) )))))))
CustomField.label: Poverty Income Level
